title: Non-record: Discarding Transformers. Elastic Associative Memory as a Language Model, 97% Intelligence Transfer in 14MBs
author: nguthiru

data.description: Replaces transformer inference with an associative memory store that reads hidden-state patterns via additive counter superposition and kNN retrieval.
Flat key-value nearest-neighbor store blended with EAM predictions during evaluation.
Trains an encoder to map tokens into EAM key space and a decoder to map EAM readouts to logits.

novel_contributions: Replaces transformer inference with Elastic Associative Memory while discarding the teacher at eval time
Stores teacher hidden states using additive counter superposition in self-organized memory locations
Combines EAM with flat kNN retrieval to outperform the teacher
Demonstrates 97.9% intelligence transfer in a 14.1 MB artifact
Shows predictable scaling of reconstruction quality with EAM capacity
Frames distillation as a write operation into associative memory
